candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line, but nothing indicates it is COGS-specific or tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Materials'. The selected COGS row is a direct materials line, so adding company-level depreciation here would risk misclassification.
Separate operating amortisation line, but not labelled as related to cost of materials / COGS. Adding it to the selected COGS bucket would risk misclassification.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost of Materials'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines and do not appear to belong specifically to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating profit. It sits alongside, not within, the selected SG&A component rows. The selected XSGA bucket excludes the subtotal 'Operating expenses', and the listed SG&A components sum to that subtotal, while depreciation is shown separately, so it should be added separately later.

Explicit separate operating amortisation line above operating profit. It is not embedded in the selected SG&A component rows and appears as a separate same-level operating expense, so it should be added separately later.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA component rows exclude D&A. 'Operating expenses' appears to equal the non-D&A SG&A components, while 'Depreciation' and 'Amortisation intangible assets' are presented separately above operating profit, so both should be added separately to XSGA.
